understanding.goal_understanding: The objective was to complete each KA59 level by moving/positioning every selectable piece so that all goal tiles marked with '+' in the semantic grid were occupied at the same time, then repeat across levels until the final level reported WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions attempted to shift the currently selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction; if blocked by walls or other obstructing objects the piece would not move. Some adjacent objects could be pushable, allowing the selected piece to move while pushing that object along the same direction if space permitted, whereas walls/boundaries could fully prevent motion. When multiple selectable pieces were present, CLICK with an exact object pixel position switched control to that piece (updating player.id/position) so each could be moved independently within the shared grid and step budget.
